job_summary: A CRO-based CRA works for a Contract Research Organization, managing clinical trials on behalf of multiple sponsors (pharmaceutical/biotech companies).
key_responsibilities: Monitor clinical trial sites across different sponsor projects
Conduct Site Initiation, Monitoring, and Close-Out Visits
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice
Manage multiple protocols and therapeutic areas
Coordinate with sponsors and site staff
career_path: CRA → Senior CRA → Lead CRA → Project Manager
skills_required: coordinate with sponsors and site staff
manage multiple protocols and therapeutic areas
monitor clinical trial sites across different sponsor projects
